description: This file defines a Manipulator object with functions to set, remove, and get data attributes on DOM elements, including normalization of data values and keys.

methods.name: normalizeData
methods.description: Normalizes string data values to boolean, null, number, or JSON object.

methods.name: normalizeDataKey
methods.description: Converts camelCase keys to kebab-case with a 'data-bs-' prefix.

methods.name: setDataAttribute
methods.description: Sets a data attribute on a DOM element with a normalized key.

methods.name: removeDataAttribute
methods.description: Removes a data attribute from a DOM element with a normalized key.

methods.name: getDataAttributes
methods.description: Retrieves all data attributes starting with 'bs' (excluding 'bsConfig') and returns them as an object with normalized keys.

methods.name: getDataAttribute
methods.description: Retrieves and normalizes a specific data attribute value from a DOM element.
